concerns.text: FR-002 mandates a decision logic using Levene's test to select between T-Test and Wilcoxon. No task implements Levene's test or the T-Test/Wilcoxon fallback path. The plan explicitly rejects this logic in favor of ANOVA, but the spec requirement remains unimplemented in tasks, creating a coverage gap for FR-002.

FR-002 and US-002 list 'explanation_engagement_time' as a metric requiring statistical significance testing. The plan excludes this from inferential testing (descriptive only). No task exists to implement the spec's requirement for testing this metric, leaving FR-002 partially unimplemented.

EC-001 requires the system to 'report the actual N achieved' and 'flag the power limitation' if recruitment targets are not met for specific subgroups. T030 only generates a report if N < 30 (aggregate). There is no task to explicitly implement the logic for flagging power limitations for underpowered subgroups when the aggregate N is met.

User Story 0 requires the system to integrate specific XAI techniques (e.g., SHAP, LIME) as configurable options. T013 hardcodes a 'deterministic, rule-based simulation' mapping task difficulty to heatmaps. No task exists to implement the configurable selection of real XAI algorithms (SHAP/LIME) as mandated by the spec.

SC-002 defines success as measuring significance via 'Paired T-Test or Wilcoxon Signed-Rank'. The plan replaces this with ANOVA. No task implements the T-Test/Wilcoxon logic required to satisfy SC-002 as written in the spec, leaving the success criterion untestable against the implemented code.
